'''The Muunilinst 10''' was an elite group of [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-Class]] and [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] led by ARC [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Fordo|Alpha-77 Fordo]] that consisted of four ARC Alpha Lieutenants, and eight infantry clones. The group was named for its role the destruction of the [[Harnaidan defensive cannon]] on [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] during an early [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The mission on Muunilinst would also see them fight alongside with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to capture the Banking Clan headquarters and defeat the bounty hunter [[Durge/Legends|Durge]].

Soon after the Battle of Muunilinst, Fordo would lead a team of 20 ARC [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha]] lieutenants on a mission to evacuate the surviving Jedi Generals from [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]]. This operation would see them engage in a vicious battle with General Grievous. Although they were the best of the best, The Muunilinst 10 would sustain some casualties. The clone trooper [[CT-43/002]] was killed during an ambush on Muunilinst and four ARC Alpha lieutenants were cut down by Grievous at Hypori.

==History==
===Mission to Muunilinst===
[[File:Muunilinst_10.png|thumb|left|250px|[[Fordo|Captain Fordo]] and the remaining members of the Muunilinst 10 awaiting [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Kenobi]].]]
The [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] 10 were deployed to destroy a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] artillery cannon and aid in the capture of key [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] officials. While flying in a modified [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] to their target area, the gunship was shot down by a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droid]] with a rocket launcher, and it crash-landed in the city, killing the two pilots.<ref name="CW2">{{CW|2}}</ref> When they exited the gunship, they were surrounded by sniper-fire. One clone, [[CT-43/002]], was killed instantly in the barrage.<ref name="CW3">{{CW|3}}</ref>

Fordo ordered two of his clones to distract the [[Battle droid assassin|droid snipers]] and another clone to scope the location for the snipers. After spotting the droids' locations, an ARC trooper wielding a [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1]] destroyed the building ledges where the snipers had been.<ref name="CW3" />

The group kept going toward their objective, and eventually encountered an [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AAT]]. While one ARC Lieutenant crept up on the AAT from above, the remaining eight provided cover fire. The ARC jumped on top of the AAT, fired his way inside, and planted explosives, before jumping out and detonating them.<ref name="CW3" />

Eventually, they arrived at the artillery cannon and after destroying many battle droids, destroyed the cannon with several high powered explosives and rappelled up the control tower.<ref name="CW3" />

After the arrival of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], they blasted their way inside the command center, defeating the numerous droids guarding it and taking and aiding in the defeat of the feared [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] before securing the room, despite some of them suffering injuries inflicted by Durge. This action was the key point in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] capture of the planet.<ref name="CW9">{{CW|9}}</ref>

===Mission to Hypori===
[[File:ARC_LAAT.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Muunilinst 10 deploy from their [[Muunilinst 10 LAAT|LAAT/i]] on Hypori.]]
The survivors were reinforced with heavy gunners and additional troops and were sent to [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]] to retrieve the surviving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of the [[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Battle of Hypori]], and arrived there in surprisingly little time. There, Fordo ordered two of his men to investigate two of the three life signs he detected. While one of his men investigated one of the life signs in the rubble and another in the rafters of the downed Acclamator assault ship, Fordo led the rest of his men to the one directly ahead of them. The life sign Fordo detected turned out to be Ki-Adi Mundi, who had just been disarmed by Grievous. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] was about to deal the killing blow to Mundi when Fordo and his men opened fire on him. Grievous was able to evade the fire by ducking behind rubble. The troopers used the power of the [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon/Legends|Z-6 rotary blaster cannon]], [[Reciprocating quad blaster cannon/Legends|reciprocating quad blaster]] and [[under-barrel grenade launcher]]s to destroy the cover provided by the [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]]. However, Grievous was able to continue to evade fire. Grievous attempted to scale up to the roof but was forced down by a volley of grenades. He landed next to 4 ARC lieutenants whom he promptly cut down with his two lightsabers. Fordo called for immediate backup. The weaponry of their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|ARC gunship]] was able to drive Grievous off, enabling evacuation of the survivors. Fordo was granted [[Jaig eyes]] for his actions on Hypori.

===Battle of Coruscant===
They were present at the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], among other [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] defending [[Sector Four (Coruscant)|sector 4]], when they became overwhelmed. Captain [[Fordo]] ordered a retreat, but was belayed by Masters [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] who arrived to assist.

==Equipment==
The Muunilinst 10 were referred to as the best of the best, and were extremely effective in battle. As such, they carried many weapons, including standard issue [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifles]], modified [[DC-17 hand blaster/Legends|DC-17 hand blasters]] as well as [[WESTAR-M5 blaster rifle]]s, [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]], heat signature detectors, [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1 portable missile launchers]], [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon/Legends|Z-6 rotary blaster cannons]], [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|droid poppers]], and [[Reciprocating quad blaster cannon/Legends|reciprocating quad blasters]].

===LAAT/i===
The [[Muunilinst 10 LAAT]] was repainted with a [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]] nose art design. The gunship had a jagged blue line up to the top of it. There was also blue covering the missile pod and wings, except the wings, which had white triangles going to the top.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:SW-Micro-Galaxy-Muunilinst-10.png|thumb|right|250px|''Star Wars'' Micro Galaxy Squadron Muunilinst 10 set]]
Although the ''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'' establishes that a total of 10 clones (including Fordo) comprised the Muunilinst 10, the number shown on-screen varies considerably. After Kenobi's briefing in [[Chapter 2 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Clone Wars Chapter 2]], nine clones are shown. Ten are visible after the LAAT/i is hit by a missile, and eleven disembark from the fallen gunship. The number once again reduces to ten in a scene when the clones plant the explosives on an artillery cannon. When Obi-Wan Kenobi rendezvouses with the Muunilinst 10, there are again nine clones. Finally, during the battle with Durge, the number of clones exceeds ten, which could mean that the unit has regrouped with the main invasion force in order to capture key InterGalactic Banking Clan officials. The number of ARC Alpha Lieutenants also changes from two to three to four, depending on the scene. Additionally, during the Battle of Hypori, nineteen clones are seen in several shots, with the number fluctuating as with previous chapters.
